LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS GEORGE UNMACHT & JEANNE UNMACHT HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER TO PROVIDE ISSUES TO BE ADDRESSED TO COURT & COUNSEL BY 6/17/2010. EACH SIDE IS TO PROVIDE PROPOSED STATEMENTS OF DECISION TO COURT AND COUNSEL ON OR BEFORE 7/9/2010. EACH SIDE IS TO PROVIDE COMMENTS TO THE PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION TO COURT AND COUNSEL BY 7/16/2010. (COUNSEL ADVISED TO CITE TO THE RECORD.) JULY 16, 2010 IS CONSIDERED AS THE SUBMISSION DATE FOR THE COURT'S PURPOSES. (THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S CALENDAR FROM JUN-04-2010 TO JUL-16-2010, BUT THERE WILL BE NO APPEARANCES BY COUNSEL.) COUNSEL MAY SERVE EACH OTHER BY E-MAIL OR FAX SERVICE. COUNSEL TO PROVIDE THE PROPOSED STATEMENT TO THE COURT BY EITHER DISK, OR EMAIL, ATTACHMENT IN WORD FORMAT. COMMENTS MAY BE PROVIDED IN WRITING. (THE COURT RETAINS THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Petitioners George Unmacht And Jeanne Unmacht Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS GEORGE UNMACHT AND JEANNE UNMACHT'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: matter is deemed submitted. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Petitioners George Unmacht And Jeanne Unmacht Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Continued To Jul-16-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Set for hearing on Friday, June 4, 2010, line 4, Petitioners George Unmacht & Jeanne Unmacht Hearing on Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus. Appearances: Edith J. Benay, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 241-7286 appearing for Petitioners and Moving party; Margaret W. Baumgartner, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3859 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Hearing held and argued. Petitioner is asking for a statement of decision. The Court rules as follows: Petitioner to provide issues to be addressed to Court & counsel by 6/17/2010. Each side is to provide proposed statements of decision to Court and counsel on or before 7/9/2010. Each side is to provide comments to the proposed statement of decision to Court and counsel by 7/16/2010. (Counsel advised to cite to the record.) July 16, 2010 is considered as the submission date for the Court's purposes. (This matter is continued on the Court's calendar to 7/16/2010, but there will be no appearances by counsel.) Counsel may serve each other by e-mail or FAX service. Counsel to provide the proposed statement to the Court by either disk, or email, attachment in word format. Comments may be provided in writing. (The Court retains the Administrative record.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Petitioners George Unmacht And Jeanne Unmacht Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
